---
title: "Tools & Code"
---

## Numerical modeling

Landlab and landscape-evolution modeling.

## Remote sensing

Sentinel-1 InSAR, MintPy, GNSS integration, GIS, and DEM analysis.

## Geochronology and thermochronology

AHe, ZHe, AFT, HeFTy modeling, and luminescence sampling.

## Programming and visualization

Python, MATLAB, PyGMT, TopoToolbox, and scientific visualization.

*Selected workflows and public repositories will be added soon.*
